series_metadata.series_description: Documents used to litigate cases and record events that have occurred in a case. Records include, but are not limited to, cover letter, appeal and complaint, claim packet from the Industrial Commission (IC) or Bureau of Worker's Compensation (BWC), assistant attorney general notes, pleadings, correspondence, court orders, discovery, medical records and release forms, deposition transcripts and videos, summary reports, investigative reports, and employer's records (created or gathered by the AGO).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: case closed and all appeals exhausted. ; Paper: Medical records disposed of final court entry and all appeals exhausted. all other documents case closed and all appeals exhausted. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately
